since_last: 68% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.04%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.36% · BTC +1.01% · Gold +1.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.08%. 68% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.04%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.04%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.82%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.82%, CEVA +8.17%, AMAT +8.17%, SYNA +8.15%, AMD +7.94%. Laggards: AVAV -4.95%, SOUN -4.56%, PLTR -4.34%, CRM -2.31%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.45% at $148.97
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
